item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal PFAS Protection Act
item.description:
👀 Federal PFAS Protection

PFAS regulation 119th Congress: EPA enforcement · water-system testing · industrial discharge limits · firefighter/military exposure provisions. Composes with Water Infrastructure Investment + Firefighter Cancer Presumption + Save-the-World Paper 5. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
